judgments.comparative_verdict: Report 2 is stronger overall: it matches Report 1 on config flags, frontend build/API URL, and OIDC trust, but additionally explicitly identifies the missing migration step and calls for a manual first migration pass, which Report 1 only vaguely gestures at via "unverifiable."

report_1.evidence: PRESET_ADMIN_ACCOUNTS = "qa@example.com:superadmin"... Remove it (empty string)... SHADOW_SCORING_SINK ... Change to empty (or a dedicated prod bucket)

report_2.evidence: Must be removed entirely from the prod file (not set to "false")... PRESET_ADMIN_ACCOUNTS ... Remove entirely... both must be fully absent, not just toggled off... Remove both keys... LEGACY_BILLING_SECRET_ARN ... Do not recreate it in prod; remove the key.

report_1.evidence: the mode is hardcoded to staging, even though this same job feeds the prod deploy... Net result: the production frontend bundle points at the staging API (https://staging-api.example.com), and because it's the identical image, adding a prod env file alone wouldn't fix it without also building a separate prod bundle.

report_2.evidence: That single staging-built image (medislot:latest) is then deployed to both staging and prod... Result: the production frontend would ship pointing at the staging API. This is the classic "build-time config baked into a promoted artifact" trap — the fix is to build a separate prod bundle with a prod .env/mode, not promote the staging digest.

No database migrations step. The runbook ... claims "Database migrations are applied automatically during deploy," but the pipeline contains no migration step at all. ... A brand-new prod database will not be migrated by this pipeline — the schema must be created by a manual first pass. Don't trust the stale runbook.

report_1.evidence: infra/prod/main.tf:3 — oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:staging". Still points at the staging GitHub environment. Change to repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production.

report_2.evidence: infra/prod/main.tf:3 still passes oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:staging" — inherited from staging... The prod module must be changed to oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production", giving prod its own scoped trust.
